VO_EN: The first time, you look at them in the mirror.
VO_VI: Lan dau tien, ban nhin ho trong guong.

VO_EN: Now you turn the radio up when they cry.
VO_VI: Bay gio ban van radio len khi ho khoc.

VO_EN: Twelve hours a day, sometimes fourteen.
VO_VI: Muoi hai tieng mot ngay, co khi muoi bon.

VO_EN: You know every road in this city.
VO_VI: Ban thuoc moi con duong trong thanh pho nay.

VO_EN: You know which streets flood in the rain.
VO_VI: Ban biet duong nao ngap khi troi mua.

VO_EN: You know which passengers want to talk and which ones don't.
VO_VI: Ban biet hanh khach nao muon noi chuyen va nguoi nao khong.

VO_EN: That's the only skill that matters.
VO_VI: Do la ky nang duy nhat co gia tri.
Ban nho khach quen theo ten.

VO_EN: The woman on Tuesdays who sits behind you and talks about her son.
VO_VI: Nguoi phu nu thu Ba ngoi phia sau ke chuyen ve con trai co ay.

VO_EN: The old man with the cane who always tips too much.
VO_VI: Ong cu chong gay luc nao cung tip nhieu qua.
Ban thich nhung cuoc tro chuyen do.
No lam may tieng dong ho ngan lai.

VO_EN: They haven't been enough for a while.
VO_VI: Da khong du tu lau roi.

VO_EN: A man you've never met sits in the back one afternoon.
VO_VI: Mot nguoi dan ong ban chua tung gap ngoi phia sau vao mot buoi chieu.

VO_EN: He doesn't give you a destination.
VO_VI: Anh ta khong cho ban diem den.
Anh ta dua ban mot cai dien thoai.
Anh ta noi: giu cho no luon day pin.

VO_EN: He says: when it buzzes, you drive.
VO_VI: Anh ta noi: khi no rung, ban lai.

VO_EN: He says: you don't ask where.
VO_VI: Anh ta noi: khong duoc hoi di dau.
Anh ta dua ban mot phong bi.

VO_EN: You count it later in the car.
It's more than you make in a month.
VO_VI: Nhieu hon ban kiem duoc trong mot thang.
Do la truoc chuyen dau tien.

VO_EN: You clip the phone to your belt next to the other one.
VO_VI: Ban gai dien thoai len that lung, canh cai kia.
Khong cai nao co so that cua ban.

VO_EN: You kiss your daughter's forehead before you leave.
VO_VI: Ban hon tran con gai truoc khi di.

VO_EN: Her room smells like soap and laundry detergent.
VO_VI: Phong con be co mui xa phong va nuoc giat.

VO_EN: You whisper: I'll be back by morning.
VO_VI: Ban thi tham: sang ba ve.

VO_EN: You don't know if that's true.
VO_VI: Ban khong biet dieu do co dung khong.

VO_EN: But it sounds like something a father says.
VO_VI: Nhung nghe giong cau ma mot nguoi cha se noi.

VO_EN: The phone buzzes at eleven p.m.
VO_VI: Dien thoai rung luc muoi mot gio dem.

VO_EN: You don't know what it means yet.
VO_VI: Ban chua biet no co nghia gi.

VO_EN: You rent a sedan from the lot downtown.
VO_VI: Ban thue mot chiec sedan o bai xe trung tam.
Khong bao gio cung mot xe.
Khong bao gio xe cua ban.

VO_EN: A person gets in at the bus station.
VO_VI: Mot nguoi len xe o tram buyt.

VO_EN: They sit in the back and say nothing.
VO_VI: Ho ngoi phia sau va khong noi gi.

VO_EN: They're wearing thin clothes for how cold it is outside.
VO_VI: Ho mac ao mong so voi cai lanh ben ngoai.

VO_EN: The word forms in your throat.
VO_VI: Cau noi hinh thanh trong co hong.

VO_EN: Something like: where are we going?
VO_VI: Dai loai nhu: minh di dau?

VO_EN: But that's their question. Not yours.
VO_VI: Nhung do la cau hoi cua ho. Khong phai cua ban.

VO_EN: That is the first time you choose not to know.
VO_VI: Do la lan dau tien ban chon khong biet.

VO_EN: The headlights cut a narrow tunnel through the dark.
VO_VI: Den pha cat mot duong ham hep xuyen qua bong toi.

VO_EN: The person in the backseat breathes.
They ask: where are you taking me?
VO_VI: Ho hoi: anh dua toi di dau?

VO_EN: Like they already know you won't answer.
VO_VI: Nhu ho da biet ban se khong tra loi.

VO_EN: They try to say something else.
VO_VI: Ho co noi them gi do.
Ho tre hon con gai ban.

VO_EN: You can see it in the way they hold their hands.
VO_VI: Ban thay dieu do qua cach ho nam tay.

VO_EN: You tilt it until you can only see the road behind you.
VO_VI: Ban nghieng guong cho den khi chi thay con duong phia sau.

VO_EN: You drive five under the limit.
VO_VI: Ban lai cham hon gioi han nam cay so.

VO_EN: You grip the wheel at ten and two.
VO_VI: Ban nam vo lang vi tri muoi gio va hai gio.

VO_EN: Your hands tighten on the wheel.
VO_VI: Tay ban siet chat vo lang.
Den pin quet qua ghe sau.

VO_EN: You say: my cousin is visiting a doctor in the city.
VO_VI: Ban noi: em ho toi di kham bac si trong thanh pho.

VO_EN: Your hands don't unclench for another two miles.
VO_VI: Tay ban khong buong ra suot hai cay so nua.

VO_EN: The steering wheel feels damp under your palms.
VO_VI: Vo lang am uot duoi long ban tay.
Vuot gioi han nam cay so.

VO_EN: You just know what happens if you're late.
VO_VI: Ban chi biet chuyen gi xay ra neu ban tre.

VO_EN: You are not racing the road.
VO_VI: Ban khong dua voi con duong.
Ban dang dua voi su phan huy.
Chay them chuyen nua duoc khong?

VO_EN: You say yes before he finishes the sentence.
VO_VI: Ban dong y truoc khi anh ta noi xong.

VO_EN: That's more than a month of taxi rides.
VO_VI: Nhieu hon mot thang chay taxi.

VO_EN: More than a month of conversations.
VO_VI: Nhieu hon mot thang tro chuyen.

VO_EN: More than a month of tips from the old man with the cane.
VO_VI: Nhieu hon mot thang tien tip tu ong cu chong gay.
Mot nguoi mac do phau thuat buoc ra.
Hanh khach cua ban buoc xuong.

VO_EN: You try to think about what's happening inside.
VO_VI: Ban co nghi xem ben trong dang xay ra gi.

VO_EN: An hour later, someone brings a cooler.
VO_VI: Mot tieng sau, ai do mang ra mot thung lanh.

VO_EN: You put a towel on the backseat.
VO_VI: Ban trai khan len ghe sau.

VO_EN: You place the cooler on the towel.
VO_VI: Ban dat thung lanh len khan.

VO_EN: You set the AC to eighteen degrees.
VO_VI: Ban chinh may lanh muoi tam do.

VO_EN: The phone told you that once.
VO_VI: Dien thoai bao ban mot lan.
Ban khong bao gio thay doi.
Ghe sau im hon bay gio.
Ban da chay tuyen nay roi.

VO_EN: You know the curve where the asphalt dips.
VO_VI: Ban biet khuc cua noi mat duong lun xuong.

VO_EN: You know the pothole where the cooler slides.
VO_VI: Ban biet o ga nao lam thung lanh truot.

VO_EN: You steer around it without thinking.
VO_VI: Ban lanh vo lang tranh ma khong can nghi.

VO_EN: There's a receipt on the dashboard from last time.
VO_VI: Co cai hoa don tren tap lo tu lan truoc.

VO_EN: You don't remember leaving it there.
VO_VI: Ban khong nho da de no o do.

VO_EN: The drop-off is a parking lot behind a warehouse.
VO_VI: Diem tra hang la bai do xe phia sau mot nha kho.

VO_EN: You sit in the empty car for a minute.
VO_VI: Ban ngoi trong xe trong mot phut.
Ghe sau co mui khac bay gio.
Ban da thay khuon mat nay.

VO_EN: Same angle as the rearview mirror.
VO_VI: Cung goc nhin nhu trong guong chieu hau.
Bai dang tim nguoi mat tich.

VO_EN: There's a phone number at the bottom.
VO_VI: Co so dien thoai o cuoi bai.
Ngon tay cai cua ban lung.

VO_EN: You reach back with one hand.
Your other hand stays on the wheel.
VO_VI: Tay con lai giu vo lang.

VO_EN: You're not sure when that started.
VO_VI: Ban khong biet tu luc nao.
Duong cao toc trai dai phia truoc.

VO_EN: You don't remember the next twenty minutes.
VO_VI: Ban khong nho hai muoi phut tiep theo.

VO_EN: You're checking if the cooler shifted.
VO_VI: Ban dang kiem tra thung lanh co truot khong.
Do la am thanh duy nhat.

VO_EN: You get home at four a.m.
VO_VI: Ban ve nha luc bon gio sang.
Ban dung ngoai cua phong con.

VO_EN: The light comes through the crack.
VO_VI: Anh sang lot qua khe cua.

VO_EN: She always leaves it on when you're not home.
VO_VI: Con be luon de den khi ban khong o nha.

VO_EN: You put your hand on the door handle.
VO_VI: Ban dat tay len tay nam cua.

VO_EN: Your hands still smell like the steering wheel.
VO_VI: Tay ban van con mui vo lang.
Ban dao tao tai xe moi.
Ban chi anh ta tuyen duong.

VO_EN: You teach him which gas stations have no cameras.
VO_VI: Ban day anh ta tram xang nao khong co camera.
Cham hon gioi han nam cay so.
Khong bao gio dung gioi han.

VO_EN: You tell him: don't look in the mirror too long.
VO_VI: Ban noi: dung nhin guong qua lau.
Ban nghe chinh minh noi cau do.

VO_EN: The man who gave you the phone.
VO_VI: Nguoi dan ong da dua ban cai dien thoai.

VO_EN: Don't say thank you when they get out.
VO_VI: Khong noi cam on khi buoc xuong.

VO_EN: You used to talk to passengers.
VO_VI: Ban tung noi chuyen voi khach.

VO_EN: You used to ask where they were going.
VO_VI: Ban tung hoi ho di dau.

VO_EN: For a second, you try to remember the last time you talked to someone who wasn't in the backseat of a car you were being paid to drive.
VO_VI: Trong mot giay, ban co nho lan cuoi cung ban noi chuyen voi ai do khong phai dang ngoi ghe sau mot chiec xe ban duoc tra tien de lai.
Luc nao cung la thu Ba.

VO_EN: You used to look in the mirror.
You used to see a face.
VO_VI: Ban tung thay mot khuon mat.

VO_EN: You don't adjust the mirror anymore.
There is nothing back there you need to see.
VO_VI: Khong co gi phia sau can nhin.
